title: UofA Demo — Centrifugal Blood Pump CFD
description: Demonstration of the UofA C1 + C2 + C3 pipeline against a small synthetic credibility artifact. Pre-computed JSON-LD; no LLM runtime needed.

license.passage: Public domain (synthetic content authored for this demo).

what_it_shows: Input passage describing a credibility assessment activity
Pre-computed UofA JSON-LD bundle that an LLM would otherwise extract
C1: ed25519 signature + SHA-256 integrity verification
C3: Jena rule engine running 23 weakener-detection patterns
